title: Obsidian develops a new Fallout after the cancellation of Avowed, according to multiple reports
summary: The studio responsible for Fallout: New Vegas would work on a new installment of the saga led by Josh Sawyer, after Microsoft canceled the sequel to Avowed amid layoffs.

title: Mass layoffs at Xbox and Bethesda draw criticism from unions and political figures
summary: Microsoft lays off thousands of employees at its game studios, while lawmakers and unions denounce the situation and workers organize protests.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced receives positive reviews and multiple guides for its new features
summary: The remake/remaster of the pirate classic is praised by critics and has extensive coverage of its improvements, performance, and unlockable content.

title: Mario Kart Tour and Final Fantasy 7 Ever Crisis will shut down their servers in September
summary: Nintendo and Square Enix confirm the end of their free-to-play mobile games, a trend that reflects the decline of games as a service on portable platforms.

title: Sony and Bungie settle $200 million lawsuit with former Marathon director
summary: The former Marathon director reaches an agreement with Sony and Bungie after being fired for alleged misconduct, and his name appears in the credits of Marathon.

title: More than 220,000 people sign petition against the removal of physical discs on PlayStation
summary: Players and figures like Solid Snake criticize Sony's decision to remove the physical format, while leaks point to reasons different from the official ones.

title: Persona 4 Revival will modify an important character to remove homophobic content
summary: Atlus confirms significant changes to one of the most beloved characters of the original game, with the aim of removing homophobic references.

title: Mortal Shell 2 will launch on August 20, 2026
summary: The anticipated soulslike Mortal Shell 2 confirms its release date for August 2026, with versions for PC and consoles.

title: Bithell Games announces Vampirium 1997, an immersive sim where Dracula is king of England
summary: The creators of Thomas Was Alone present Vampirium 1997, a stealth and assassination game in a vampiric alternate history that will come to Steam in early access.

title: MindsEye developers protest against a fan event organized by their own studio
summary: Employees of Build a Rocket Boy protest against a paid fan event while the studio goes through multiple rounds of layoffs.

title: Destiny 2 fans create a game to throw tomatoes at the car of former Bungie CEO
summary: Players, frustrated with the state of the game, develop a minigame where they can throw tomatoes at Pete Parsons' car collection.

title: Palworld reaches a player milestone before its 1.0 launch with no price increase
summary: Studio Pocketpair decides not to raise the price of Palworld while the game prepares for its final version and breaks a new user record.

title: Subnautica 2 receives its first major update that allows stunning fish
summary: The update adds new tools to defend against marine fauna, responding to player complaints about violence against fish.

title: Minecraft finally adds the ability to sit down after 17 years
summary: One of the most requested features by the community arrives in the game with the update that allows characters to sit on stairs and slabs.

title: The person in charge of the GTA Trilogy remaster acknowledges fan anger but defends the work
summary: After almost five years of silence, the studio responsible for the GTA Trilogy release admits that many players enjoyed the product despite the bugs.

title: The werewolf love interest in Love and Deepspace might disappear permanently after controversy
summary: The Chinese government intervenes in the controversy over a new character in the dating game, indicating that the werewolf will not return to the game.

title: Buckshot Roulette comes to Xbox Game Pass and Xbox consoles
summary: The popular Russian horror game of Russian roulette launches on Xbox Series and Xbox One, and is also available for Game Pass subscribers.

title: The Crew Motorfest will launch on Nintendo Switch 2 on October 8
summary: Ubisoft's open-world racing game confirms its arrival on Nintendo's new console with a release date.

title: The Blood of Dawnwalker allows completing the game before the prologue, according to its creators
summary: The vampire RPG from former The Witcher 3 developers offers a mechanic that allows finishing the game very early, challenging completionists.

title: The Fallout series receives multiple Emmy nominations, but main actors are left out
summary: The television adaptation of the video game gets 10 nominations in the second season of the Emmys, although the performers are ignored in the acting categories.
